latest.title: Tigers wear stripe shadows as camouflage
latest.script_key: tigers use stripes to break up their outline watch the stripes against grass and shade because they split the body outline into harder pieces to track that camouflage helps a big animal get closer before prey locks on the pattern is stealth not decoration would you spot the tiger first

latest.title: Tiger cubs survive monsoon in the wild
latest.script_key: monsoon cubs hide like this because their stripes aren t just for camouflage they channel rain straight off their backs like tiny gutters watch how the cub tucks in that s why you never see the whole litter at once did you learn stripes were just for hiding too

latest.title: Microscopes reveal what textbooks got wrong about cells
latest.script_key: see this blobby blob with a dot that s not the nucleus it s the nucleolus inside the nucleus textbooks drew it way too neat the real thing s a messy blob factory where ribosomes get built that s why cells look alive under a scope they re always busy making stuff ever zoomed in on your own world before

latest.title: Auroras glow when solar particles hit air
latest.script_key: auroras start with charged particles from the sun watch the moving color because charged particles follow earth s magnetic field toward the upper atmosphere when they hit oxygen and nitrogen the air releases light the sky is reacting to space weather which rare sky event next

latest.title: Rivers carve bends by stealing from one bank

latest.title: Alpine lakes hide a quiet erosion secret
latest.script_key: watch the shoreline vanish those rocks aren t just sitting there they re rolling that s because the lake itself is slowly eating the mountain the water isn t still it s cutting every wave lifts grains chips away at the rock that s why the shore creeps back each year did you notice the rocks are rounder here than up top

latest.title: Mushrooms trade nutrients through underground threads

latest.title: Horses don't hate snow like you think
